# aisw

> Documentation for aisw CLI.

Current version: 0.3.2

## Docs

- [aisw documentation](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/): aisw manages named profiles for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI. Switch between work, personal, and client accounts with one command on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
- [Quickstart](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/quickstart/): Install aisw, store your first profiles, and switch between Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI accounts in under five minutes.
- [Commands](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/commands/): Complete syntax and flag reference for all aisw commands — add, use, list, status, remove, rename, backup, init, uninstall, shell-hook, and doctor.
- [Automation and Scripting](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/automation/): Using aisw in CI pipelines, shell scripts, and non-interactive environments — flags, JSON output, exit codes, and common patterns.
- [Shell Integration](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/shell-integration/): Install and configure the aisw shell hook for bash, zsh, and fish. Understand what the hook does and how shell completions work.
- [Adding Profiles](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/adding-profiles/): How to add and capture named profiles in aisw using API keys, OAuth, environment variables, and live credential import.
- [Supported Tools](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/supported-tools/): Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI support matrix — auth methods, credential locations, OS keyring support, and state mode behavior per platform.
- [Configuration](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/configuration/): aisw configuration file location, schema, field reference, directory layout, and AISW_HOME override.
- [How It Works](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/how-it-works/): Profile model, atomic credential switching, OS keyring integration, and per-tool implementation details for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI.
- [Security](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/security/): How aisw stores and protects credentials — local-only storage, OS keyring integration, file permissions, transactional writes, and OAuth flow safety.
- [Why aisw?](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/why-aisw/): Why aisw exists — the problems with manual credential switching across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI, and how named profiles solve them.
- [Troubleshooting](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/troubleshooting/): Diagnosing and fixing common aisw failures — missing tools, hook problems, keyring issues, permission errors, and OAuth failures.

## Project

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/burakdede/aisw): Source code, releases, and issue tracking.
- [README](https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/README.md): Project overview and install guidance.
